title: Producer bridge canonicalization
goal: Make scripts/export-operator-snapshots.mjs emit contract-canonical Bureau states and checkout retention values rather than relying on controllers to repair raw producer vocabulary.

acceptance.assertion: Raw values such as open, pending, active, error and completed are exported as queued, running, failed or done according to the documented contract.
Checkout retention output is limited to retained, archivable, orphan or unknown.
Blueprint and data-flow docs match the actual exported vocabulary, including any unknown/degraded state.

metadata.priority_reason: P1: artifact contract must be true at producer seam
